prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏热至高热，宁夏大学物理类招生专业以工科为主，相关专业热度较高对报考有一定吸引力；广东省2026年物理类考生约456000人，较2025年440208人增长约3.6%，考生规模小幅增加，竞争略有加剧；2026年；宁夏大学位于宁夏银川市，与广东省距离较远，属于跨省招生。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated significantly: approximately 63443 → 76351 → 51255 → 48618 → 87666. In 2025, the ranking dropped sharply to about 87666, with a cumulative decline of approximately 39000 over the past two years, indicating a notable change in the competitive landscape. Enrollment plans for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 14 → 15 → 13 → 16 → 39, with a substantial expansion to 39 in 2025. The 2026 plan further expands to 64, an increase of about 64% compared to 2025, exerting significant downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ningxia University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has steadily risen from 170th in 2021 to 137th in 2026, indicating enhanced overall strength. In 2026, its reputation is assessed as neutral/mixed, mainly involving library management incidents, with no significant negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 104th overall, rated as 'average', indicating low attention on short-video platforms. There are no historical abnormal filing records. Fifth round of discipline evaluation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain consistently hot to very hot in social popularity. Ningxia University's Physics Category enrollment majors are mainly engineering-oriented, and the high popularity of related majors attracts some applicants. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong Province is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, leading to a slight intensification of competition. Ningxia University is located in Yinchuan, Ningxia, far from Guangdong Province, making it a cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 87666 and the key factor of a 64% expansion in 2026 enrollment plan, the expansion will significantly lower the ranking number (harder to enter → larger ranking number). Meanwhile, the 3.6% increase in Guangdong Physics Category examinees and the high popularity of engineering majors will somewhat boost application interest, partially offsetting the expansion effect. After adjusting for the slight increase in examinee numbers and major popularity factors, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 121087, with a range of 120587–121587.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (close to 120587), focus on sprinting for popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Technology and Electronic Information Engineering; if the ranking is near the upper bound, prioritize Tier 2 majors and ensure Tier 3 as a safety net.
